tracks.rawText: 3:30Studio Selectionv5CoverHigh-energy heavy metal track featuring aggressive electric guitar riffs, double-bass drumming, and a prominent, technical electric guitar solo, The song opens with a fast-paced, palm-muted rhythmic motif in E minor at 160 BPM, The production is crisp with high-gain distortion on the guitars and a punchy, compressed drum mix, The structure follows an instrumental introduction, followed by a verse-chorus pattern where the vocals are delivered in a powerful, gritty tenor with occasional melodic flourishes, A centerpiece of the track is a virtuosic guitar solo utilizing rapid alternate picking, sweep picking, and wide vibrato, The bass guitar provides a thick, distorted foundation that mirrors the rhythmic complexity of the kick drums1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Studio Selection
